checks.name: syntax

checks.name: linting
checks.message: ESLint v9.39.4 is installed but the project uses a legacy .eslintrc.json config (not eslint.config.js). ESLint refused to run. This is a pre-existing project configuration issue not introduced by this Worker. Manual code review shows no obvious lint violations in the changed files.

checks.name: build
checks.message: tsc --noEmit completed with zero errors against apps/web/tsconfig.json. Removed imports (InscriptionClient, toU256, RpcProvider, useSendTransaction, useSync, CONTRACT_ADDRESS, RPC_URL) were correctly cleaned up; no dangling references remain.

checks.name: coverage
checks.message: QUALITY.md threshold is 80%. No tests were added for the changed UI components (PairCard.tsx, markets/[pair]/page.tsx). Coverage cannot be measured. Changes are a UI-only navigation refactor with no new business logic.

checks.name: schema
checks.message: No typed artifacts (JSON outputs, API responses, D1 schema changes) were introduced by this task. Both changed files are frontend-only React components.

These match exactly the files declared in the Worker's work_logs/task-008.jsonl write entries. No undeclared files were touched.
